positive: A highly detailed, mystical woodland emblem featuring a stylized, majestic celestial deer amidst ornate, glowing crystalline flora. The deer should have prominent, glowing antlers interwoven with starry cosmic dust and moon phases. The composition must be perfectly centralized and symmetrical, enclosed within a strong, thick, decorative border. Use a high-contrast palette of deep midnight blue, emerald green, metallic silver, and ethereal glowing gold accents. The art style must be a fusion of Art Nouveau, sacred geometry, and modern graphic illustration, suitable for screen printing on fabric. The overall feel should be arcane, magical, and highly impactful. Strong silhouettes and line work are paramount.
negative: text, words, lettering, logo, signature, watermark, blurry, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, disfigured, mutation, noise, artifact, gradient fade, photographic, realistic photo
